name: growe-root
description: GROWE monorepo — npm run setup → copy growe-backend/.env.example to .env → npm run migrate → npm run dev (API :5001, UI :5173). See README.md.

scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix growe-backend && npm install --prefix growe-frontend
scripts.dev:clean: npm run dev:kill && npm run dev
scripts.dev:full: npm run dev:kill && concurrently -k -n "laravel,api,web" -c "yellow,cyan,magenta" "npm run dev:laravel" "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:web"
